home.description: 躍棧 (Yozan Tech) provides tailor-made systems, premium websites, and managed cloud services. From the very first line of code to daily maintenance, we are with you for the long haul.
home.serviceDescription: We do not pursue large-scale and comprehensive development, but focus on the basic infrastructure that small and medium-sized enterprises truly need.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Build a Solid Digital Foundation?
home.ctaDescription: Get a free 30-minute consultation. Let's discuss your current situation and goals, and we will provide tailored technical advice for your business.

flexiblePricing.label: Flexible Pricing
flexiblePricing.description: Deliver in phases according to your budget and priorities, eliminating the need for a massive upfront investment.

longTermMaintenance.label: Long-Term Maintenance
longTermMaintenance.description: From the very first line of code to daily maintenance, we are with you for the long haul.

cloudNative.label: Cloud-Native
cloudNative.description: Built on modern, scalable infrastructure ensuring your applications remain fast, secure, and highly available at all times.

directCommunication.label: Direct Communication
directCommunication.description: Communicate directly with the expert developers building your product, ensuring no requirements are lost through a middleman.

services.description: 躍棧 (Yozan Tech) focuses on three service lines, each designed to enable SME to access IT capabilities that were previously only affordable for large companies, at a reasonable cost.
services.ctaTitle: Unsure Which Option Is the Right Fit for Your Business?
services.ctaDescription: Tell us about your current situation and goals, and we will help you determine where to start investing.

customBusinessSystem.label: Custom Business Systems
customBusinessSystem.description: From internal workflows to automated operations. We build tailored ERPs, CRMs, and dashboards that perfectly fit your unique business logic, eliminating the friction of rigid off-the-shelf software.
customBusinessSystem.shortDescription: Integrate the processes scattered across Excel, Line groups, and paper documents into a system that truly belongs to you.

serviceDetail.1: Internal ERP / CRM / Order Management System
serviceDetail.2: Business process automation and auditing mechanisms
serviceDetail.4: Third-party service integration (financial payments, logistics, accounting)

premiumCorporateWebsite.label: Premium Corporate Websites
premiumCorporateWebsite.description: From high-converting landing pages to robust e-commerce platforms. We craft lightning-fast, SEO-optimized, and visually stunning digital storefronts that elevate your brand and drive actual business growth.
premiumCorporateWebsite.shortDescription: From brand positioning and copywriting structure to visual design, create websites that truly generate inquiries and conversions.

serviceDetail.4: CMS integration, allowing marketing to update content independently

maintenanceAndCloudManagement.label: Maintenance & Cloud Management
maintenanceAndCloudManagement.description: Ensuring high availability, bulletproof security, and smooth daily operations. We handle the servers, continuous deployments, and technical monitoring, so you can sleep well and focus entirely on your business.
maintenanceAndCloudManagement.shortDescription: Going live is just the beginning. We offer long-term maintenance and cloud hosting, so you don't have to build your own IT team.

serviceDetail.1: Cloud Infrastructure Design & Strategy (AWS, GCP, Cloudflare)
serviceDetail.2: System Monitoring, Data Backup & Disaster Recovery Solutions
serviceDetail.3: Performance Tuning, Scalability Enhancement & Cost Optimization
serviceDetail.4: Monthly Operations Reports, Infrastructure Reviews & Technical Advisory

about.heroDescription: The name "Yozan (躍棧)" embodies "Leading Forward (躍)" and "Technology Stack (棧)". We believe that the ambition of SMEs should never be bottlenecked by expensive, cumbersome, or rigid IT infrastructure.
about.storyP1: Yozan Tech was founded on a simple premise: SMEs deserve the same high-quality technical foundation as large enterprises. For too long, we've watched small businesses struggle with fragmented tools, exorbitant agency fees, and unmaintainable code.
about.storyP2: We exist to change that. We offer long-term technology partnerships—acting as your dedicated in-house engineering team. We don't just deliver a project and walk away; we stay by your side to ensure your digital infrastructure evolves seamlessly as your business scales.
about.ctaDescription: We'd love to hear your story. Let's grab a coffee and explore how the right technology can accelerate your growth.

companionship.title: Partnership Over Handoffs
companionship.description: Going live is just the beginning. We treat every engagement as a long-term alliance, not a one-off transaction. Your success is our ongoing responsibility.

simplicity.title: Substance Over Buzzwords
simplicity.description: The best systems are imperceptible. We architect elegant, perfectly-fitted solutions rather than piling on unnecessary technical jargon or trendy frameworks.

honesty.title: Radical Transparency
honesty.description: We will tell you exactly what you don't need. If a feature exceeds your budget without strong ROI, we'll advise against it. We refuse to overpromise just to close a deal.

footer.description: Designed for SMEs and startups, providing a modern, long-term maintainable digital infrastructure.
